name: harness
description: The team-architecture factory for Claude Code — a meta-skill that turns a domain description into an agent team and the skills they use, with six pre-defined team-architecture patterns (Pipeline, Fan-out/Fan-in, Expert Pool, Producer-Reviewer, Supervisor, Hierarchical Delegation). Claude Code 团队架构工厂：将领域描述转化为智能体团队和技能集的元技能。
